### Props

| Name                      | Type      | Required | Default                                                                    | Description                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | --------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `item`                    | `object`  |          | `null`                                                                     | Existing schema item for edit mode. Pass null for create mode.                                     |
| `dialogTitle`             | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                       | Dialog title. Defaults to "Create Schema" or "Edit Schema".                                        |
| `size`                    | `string`  |          | `'large'`                                                                  | NcDialog size                                                                                      |
| `availableSchemas`        | `array`   |          | `[]`                                                                       | Available schemas for references and composition. Array of \{ id, title, description, reference \} |
| `availableRegisters`      | `array`   |          | `[]`                                                                       | Available registers. Array of \{ id, label \}                                                      |
| `userGroups`              | `array`   |          | `[]`                                                                       | User groups for RBAC. Array of \{ id, displayname \}                                               |
| `availableTags`           | `array`   |          | `[]`                                                                       | Available tags for file property configuration                                                     |
| `loadingGroups`           | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Whether user groups are still loading                                                              |
| `inheritedProperties`     | `object`  |          | `\{\}`                                                                     | Properties inherited from parent schemas (allOf) — shown as locked rows in the properties tab      |
| `objectCount`             | `number`  |          | `0`                                                                        | Number of objects attached to this schema (used for action button disable logic)                   |
| `showExtendSchema`        | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Extend Schema" button                                                                        |
| `showAnalyzeProperties`   | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Analyze Properties" button                                                                   |
| `showValidateObjects`     | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Validate Objects" button                                                                     |
| `showDeleteObjects`       | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Delete Objects" button                                                                       |
| `showPublishObjects`      | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Publish Objects" button                                                                      |
| `showDelete`              | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                                    | Show "Delete" button                                                                               |
| `cancelLabel`             | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Cancel')`                                    |                                                                                                    |
| `closeLabel`              | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Close')`                                     |                                                                                                    |
| `confirmLabel`            | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                       | Confirm button label. Defaults to "Create" or "Save".                                              |
| `successText`             | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                       | Success message. Defaults to "Schema saved successfully."                                          |
| `extendSchemaLabel`       | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Extend schema')`                             |                                                                                                    |
| `analyzePropertiesLabel`  | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Analyze properties')`                        |                                                                                                    |
| `validateObjectsLabel`    | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Validate objects')`                          |                                                                                                    |
| `deleteObjectsLabel`      | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Delete objects')`                            |                                                                                                    |
| `publishObjectsLabel`     | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Publish objects')`                           |                                                                                                    |
| `deleteLabel`             | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Delete')`                                    |                                                                                                    |
| `deleteObjectsTooltip`    | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Delete all objects in this schema')`         |                                                                                                    |
| `publishObjectsTooltip`   | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Publish all objects in this schema')`        |                                                                                                    |
| `noDeleteObjectsTooltip`  | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No objects to delete')`                      | Tooltip for the Delete Objects button when no objects exist                                        |
| `noPublishObjectsTooltip` | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No objects to publish')`                     | Tooltip for the Publish Objects button when no objects exist                                       |
| `cannotDeleteTooltip`     | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Cannot delete: objects are still attached')` |                                                                                                    |
